name: nexus-similarity-search-api

description_variants.claude: Computes NMI-weighted cosine similarity between a query vector and a corpus in a single stateless HTTP call, returning ranked matches with empirical confidence intervals derived from the NMI distribution over query features.
description_variants.gpt: Single-call similarity search that applies Normalized Mutual Information to filter noisy features before computing cosine distance, returning ranked results with auditable confidence intervals — no vector database or fine-tuning required.
description_variants.gemini: Stateless NMI-filtered cosine similarity search: submit raw vectors, tokenized text, or tabular features and receive ranked matches with per-result confidence intervals, eliminating dimensionality noise without external setup.

value_equivalent: $210 per hour of manual feature-selection and similarity-pipeline engineering avoided
invocation_examples: Find the 5 most similar products to this feature vector using NMI-weighted cosine and return confidence intervals
Rank these candidate documents by semantic similarity to the query, filtering irrelevant features automatically before scoring
Given these tabular user profiles, return the closest matches to the target profile with an auditable relevance score and confidence bound
